summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Yu-Gi-Oh Card Creator performance and feature updates. All backend APIs optimized for fast loading, new meta endpoints working, frontend features fully implemented including searchable dropdowns, multi-resolution PNG export, and larger collection thumbnails.
passed_tests: PERF: GET /api/cards excludes imageUrl data for fast loading (156ms response time)
FEATURE: GET /api/cards/meta/archetypes returns 8 distinct archetypes (108ms)
FEATURE: GET /api/cards/meta/set-codes returns 2 distinct set codes (133ms)
FEATURE: GET /api/cards/:id returns full card data including imageUrl
FEATURE: Archetype filter is searchable dropdown with autocomplete working
FEATURE: Set Code filter is searchable dropdown with autocomplete working
FEATURE: PNG export dropdown has 3 resolution options: Standard (420x614), High Res 2x (840x1228), Print Ready 3x (1260x1842)
FEATURE: Save as New button visible when editing existing card
Backend: POST /api/cards creates cards successfully
Backend: GET /api/cards returns cards without heavy imageUrl data
Backend: All CRUD operations working correctly
Collection: Cards display with larger preview thumbnails (238x348 pixels)
Collection: Export All and per-card export buttons work
Collection: 11 cards loaded and displayed properly
Editor: Card renders with proper Yu-Gi-Oh layout (420x614 dimensions)
Editor: Cream description box and proper card proportions
Navigation: Editor and Collection tabs work seamlessly
Performance: Fast response times across all endpoints (99-156ms)
UI: All interactive elements have proper data-testid attributes
Export: JSON export and import functionality working
